snippet.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY | Spot 15" Peter Redux
snippet.description:
Essere un eroe significa anche fare scelte difficili. 🕷️ #SpiderManBrandNewDay dal 29 luglio al cinema!

È un "nuovo giorno" per Peter Parker. Combattere il crimine a tempo pieno nei panni di Spider-Man in un mondo che non si ricorda di lui — e la pressione di vedere i suoi vecchi amici andare avanti senza di lui — innesca in Peter un cambiamento che potrebbe non riuscire a controllare. Ma questa trasformazione potrebbe essere l'unica cosa in grado di fermare una nuova e sconvolgente minaccia per la città e per le persone che ama: un potente nemico impossibile da vedere.
Il mondo può aver dimenticato Peter Parker, ma lui non ha dimenticato nessuno.

snippet.title: Apex Legends x Cyberpunk Event Trailer
snippet.description:
Welcome to the Apex Legends x Cyberpunk Event, where the neon lights of E-District beckon in Wildcard and Cyberware floods the streets. But be careful: reports of Cyberpsychosis are on the rise. Hunt down the Mythic Skippy Alternator and Iconic Legend skins, and earn Eddies throughout the event to spend in the Reward Shop.

The Apex Legends x Cyberpunk Event goes live July 14.

Learn more: http://x.ea.com/apxl/cyberpunk-event

Apex Legends™ is a free-to-play* battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on PlayStation®4, PlayStation®5, Xbox® One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch™ 2, and PC via EA App, Epic Games Store and Steam: http://x.ea.com/57366.

Check out our YouTube channel: http://x.ea.com/56710
Follow us on X: https://twitter.com/playapex

snippet.title: Black Clover Second Season | Official Trailer 3 | Crunchyroll
snippet.description:
A new saga begins! Black Clover Second Season is coming to Crunchyroll in 2026! Watch Black Clover on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-bcpv

In a world where magic is everything, Asta and Yuno are both found abandoned at a church on the same day. While Yuno is gifted with exceptional magical powers, Asta is the only one in this world without any. At the age of fifteen, both receive grimoires, magic books that amplify their holder’s magic. Asta’s is a rare Grimoire of Anti-Magic that negates and repels his opponent’s spells. Being opposite but good rivals, Yuno and Asta are ready for the hardest of challenges to achieve their common dream: to be the Wizard King. Giving up is never an option!

snippet.title: Odissea | Countdown Trailer (Universal Pictures) - HD
snippet.description:
Al cinema dal 16 07 2026.
Seguici anche su: 
Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/universalpicturesinternationalitaly  
Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/universalpicturesita  
Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/universalpicsit  
http://www.odissea-ilfilm.it

Cast: Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson, Lupita Nyong’o, Zendaya, Charlize Theron
Scritto e diretto da: Christopher Nolan 
Prodotto da: Emma Thomas, Christopher Nolan 
Produttore Esecutivo: Thomas Hayslip

Il prossimo film di Christopher Nolan, Odissea, è un film epico d’azione dal respiro mitico girato in diverse parti del mondo utilizzando una nuovissima tecnologia di ripresa IMAX®. Il film porta per la prima volta il poema fondativo di Omero sugli schermi IMAX® e uscirà nelle sale italiane il 16 luglio 2026.

Odissea vede protagonisti Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson e Lupita Nyong’o, con Zendaya e Charlize Theron.

Odissea è prodotto da Emma Thomas e Christopher Nolan con la loro società, Syncopy. Il produttore esecutivo è Thomas Hayslip.

snippet.title: Dinosaurs of the Wild West | Official Kickstarter Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
Worldwide Pre-Order on Kickstarter Now: https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/sparkefilms/dinosaurs-of-the-wild-west-series

From the creative team behind the 2025 cult-dinosaur feature PRIMITIVE WAR comes an ambitious new original cinematic universe: DINOSAURS OF THE WILD WEST.

In an alternate frontier, humanity navigates a dangerous land where every journey, every town, and every war depends on the giant creatures that shaped civilization itself. Dinosaurs of the Wild West is an epic adventure series that reimagines the American frontier through a world millions of years in the making.

Massive Brontosaurs haul entire towns across the frontier.
Raptors are ridden into battle.
Pterosaurs rule the skies.

For generations, humans and dinosaurs shaped the world together.
Now something is coming that threatens to change that forever.

Narrated by actor Jesse Kove. Inspired by the illustrated world of creator Shaun Keenan. 

Alongside the full trailer, DINOSAURS OF THE WILD WEST Kickstarter campaign unveils  a mix of EARLY BIRD and LIMITED EDITION rewards that include:
 VIP ON SET EXPERIENCES
 FIRST EDITION TRADING CARD SET
 BEHIND THE SCENES ACCESS
 ASSOCIATE PRODUCER CREDITS
 And the opportunity to CREATE A DINOSAUR for the series.

Stretch goals for the campaign include expanded creature sequences, additional cinematic set pieces, major guest appearances, and the unlocking of future episodes. 

Currently the ONLY way to watch is to pre order the series through kickstarter. 

ABOUT THE PROJECT
Dinosaurs of the Wild West is an original cinematic universe created by filmmaker Luke Sparke and developed alongside a team of artists and visual effects talent behind Primitive War and multiple internationally released feature films. It’s produced by Carmel Imrie, Carly Sparke and Luke Sparke with Executive Producers Geoff Imrie, Eric Weick, Colin Hurdle, Kelly Clifford, Luke Sparke

The two promos were completed in house by Luke Sparke, Sparke Films, Let It Be Entertainment and Sparke Effects including VFX artists Vivian David, Jared Johnson, Mark Griffiths, Julien Romeo, Felipe Gonzalez, Evan Robinson, Alejandro Agudelo and in conjunction with Kubo vfx studio. VFX Supervison by Luke Sparke, Post Produced by Carly Sparke, Executive Creative Brooke Marsden and original score by Frederik Wiedmann.

Instagram:  @dinosaursofthewildwesttv & @primitivewarmovieofficial  
TikTok: @primitivewarmovie
Facebook:  @primitivewarmovie
Official Site: DOTWW.com
